# Agent Skills

Nomad publishes agent skills as folders under {repo_file}`skills/`. Each skill is a
portable bundle of instructions and references that an AI coding agent can load when
helping you build or validate a Nomad deployment.

## Connect SciFM to Nomad

Guide agents through connecting SciFMs to Nomad

Skill location:

```text
https://github.com/lanl/nomad/tree/main/skills/connect-scifm-to-nomad
```

For reproducible work, replace `main` with a release tag or commit SHA.

Ask your agent to download and install the skill into its skills directory:

```text
Download the skill from https://github.com/lanl/nomad/tree/main/skills/connect-scifm-to-nomad, resolve any symlinked references, and set it up in my skills directory. Then show me how to use the skill.
```

Different agents store skills in different places and may have their own installer
commands. Let the agent choose the correct installation path and workflow for the
environment you are using. If an installer copies only the skill folder, it should
materialize or replace symlinked references that point elsewhere in the Nomad
repository.
